theorem_question: Does actual cocycle parity on one full G15 cycle realize the sign-closing rule n_15 = -n_0 and the doubled-cycle identity rule n_30 = n_0?
required_inputs: explicit cocycle representative or signed edge assignment on G15
chosen full G15 cycle or equivalent loop data
selected witness state classified as subjective/objective/action
expected_outputs: predicted sheet endpoint after one cycle
predicted sheet endpoint after two cycles
